text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our red-hot summer camp experience comes to a
close, and it's time to head back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I can hardly believe that summer camp is
already over.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This year's summer camp was truly enjoyable. I
truly felt that I was living in the moment... and I
made summer memories that will last a lifetime.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: However, our goal race is fast approaching.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I assure you that once we return to the academy,
I'll get myself back into the racing mindset, so I
shall be counting on your guidance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the fall G1 races right around the corner,
Mejiro Ardan and I are making our final push!
